conditions.notes: Semipreparative scale LCCC used for fractionation of the diblock copolymer. The condition is defined as the CAP of PPO.
conditions.evidence_text: A similar separation is also possible on a semipreparative column... LCCC of a diblock copolymer (MeO-PEG 2000-b-PPO) on Spherisorb ODS2 (semipreparative) in 81.14 wt% THF (CAP of PPO); detection: density.
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Critical conditions for PPO on semipreparative ODS column
Critical conditions for PPO on reversed phase columns in THF-water mobile phases containing about 80% THF
conditions.evidence_text: As we have shown in a previous paper [7], a CAP for the hydrophobic PPO block can be found on reversed phase columns in THF–water mobile phases containing about 80% THF... As can be seen in Fig. 4, PPGs elute sufficiently close to critical conditions at a range between 81 and 85 wt% THF. In such a mobile phase, a separation of the block copolymer from PPGs and PPOs with allylic end group can be achieved (Fig. 5).
conditions.notes: Analytical scale LCCC used to establish CAP for PPO block. Fig 5 shows separation at 84.99 wt% THF.
conditions.physical_address: Institute of Chemistry, Karl-Franzens-University, Heinrichstrasse 28, A-8010 Graz, Austria

conditions.evidence_text: In the paper mentioned above we have used an analytical column (Jordi Gel DVB 500 RP) packed with a stationary phase consisting of 100% poly(divinyl benzene). For this study, we wanted to perform the same separation also on a semipreparative scale. As a semipreparative column with the same chemical nature is not available, we have tried to find a CAP for PPO on an ODS column. As can be seen in Fig. 4, PPGs elute sufficiently close to critical conditions at a range between 81 and 85 wt% THF. In such a mobile phase, a separation of the block copolymer from PPGs and PPOs with allylic end group can be achieved (Fig. 5).
conditions.notes: Analytical scale LCCC used to establish CAP for PPO block. Fig 5 shows separation at 84.99 wt% THF.
